def negative_test_function_stacks_too_many_mock_patch_decorators():
    rule_id = "test_function_stacks_too_many_mock_patch_decorators"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Test function has five or more @mock.patch decorators, indicating over-specified mocking."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
